rationale: The cited paper appears to be a likely theory/mechanism source rather than an incidental mention: it provides field evidence of prosocial motivation in reward-based Kickstarter crowdfunding, and the citing paper explicitly positions itself as extending prior work on backer motives and campaign success. The citing paper’s inequality/prosocial inference pathway is conceptually close to the cited paper’s prosocial goal-pursuit construct, in the same crowdfunding context. Given this plausible substantive linkage, this pair should be retained for full relation judgment.
